title: Frontend Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Joveo is a global leader in AI\\-powered, high\\-performance recruitment marketing, revolutionizing the way organizations attract and hire talent. Our innovative platform enables large employers, staffing firms, RPOs, and media agencies to optimize their recruitment media buying and talent sourcing strategies. By leveraging advanced data science and machine learning, Joveo's platform dynamically manages and optimizes online talent sourcing channels, providing real\\-time insights at every stage of the candidate journey from click to hire. Our commitment to innovation and excellence has earned us recognition, including being featured in Inc. Magazine's List of America's Fastest\\-Growing Private Companies for three consecutive years. Backed by esteemed investors such as Nexus Ventures Partners, Joveo is dedicated to powering millions of jobs daily and transforming recruitment marketing worldwide.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Joveo is seeking a highly motivated and talented Software Development Engineer I (Frontend) to join our expanding engineering team in Hyderabad. This role offers an exciting opportunity for individuals passionate about modern web development to contribute to cutting\\-edge recruitment technology. The ideal candidate will have a solid foundation in React.js and modern JavaScript, with a keen eye for building intuitive and high\\-performance user interfaces. As part of our team, you will collaborate closely with senior engineers, designers, and product managers to develop new features and enhance existing functionalities of our platform.
   

  

 This position is designed for early\\-career developers or those with up to two years of experience, including strong internships or personal projects. It provides a platform to accelerate your professional growth, deepen your technical expertise, and make a tangible impact on our product offerings. You will be mentored by experienced engineers and have the opportunity to work in a fast\\-paced, innovative environment that values continuous learning and collaboration.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess the following qualifications:
   

  

* 0\\-2 years of experience in front\\-end development, including internships or a portfolio of personal projects demonstrating relevant skills.
* Strong proficiency in React.js, including functional components, hooks, state management, and modern React patterns.
* Familiarity with current frontend build tools and ecosystems, such as Webpack, Babel, npm, or Yarn.
* Solid understanding of core web technologies: HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6\\+).
* Experience in building responsive, user\\-friendly interfaces optimized for performance and cross\\-browser compatibility.
* Basic knowledge of web performance optimization techniques and browser rendering processes.
* Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset, with a proactive approach to problem\\-solving.
* Enthusiasm for learning new technologies and staying updated with industry best practices.
* Bonus points for contributions to open\\-source projects, active GitHub profile, or personal React applications deployed online.


**Responsibilities**
 The Software Development Engineer I (Frontend) will be responsible for:
   

  

* Developing and maintaining high\\-quality, scalable, and efficient front\\-end code using React.js and modern JavaScript frameworks.
* Collaborating with product managers, designers, and backend engineers to implement new features and improve user experience.
* Participating in code reviews, ensuring adherence to best practices, coding standards, and performance optimization.
* Contributing to the design and development of intuitive UI components that enhance platform usability.
* Ensuring cross\\-browser compatibility and responsiveness of web applications across various devices.
* Identifying and troubleshooting bugs or performance issues, proposing effective solutions.
* Staying updated with emerging front\\-end technologies and integrating relevant tools and techniques into the development process.
* Supporting continuous integration and deployment processes to deliver reliable software updates.


**Benefits**
 Joveo offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support the well\\-being and professional growth of our employees. This includes competitive salary packages, health insurance coverage, and paid time off to promote work\\-life balance. We also provide opportunities for career development through training programs, workshops, and mentorship. Our collaborative and inclusive work environment fosters innovation, creativity, and continuous learning. Employees have access to modern workspaces, flexible working hours, and the latest technology tools to ensure a productive and engaging experience. Additionally, Joveo encourages participation in industry events and conferences to facilitate ongoing skill enhancement and networking opportunities.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Joveo is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. Our hiring decisions are based solely on merit and the qualifications required for the role. We believe that a diverse workforce fosters innovation and drives our continued success, and we are dedicated to providing equal employment opportunities to all candidates and employees.

title: JavaScript Developer-remote
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is one of the world's fastest\\-growing artificial intelligence companies dedicated to accelerating the development and deployment of advanced AI systems. Renowned for its innovative approach, Turing leverages cutting\\-edge technology to solve complex problems across various domains. The company fosters a dynamic, collaborative environment that encourages continuous learning and growth, making it an ideal place for talented professionals to thrive. With a focus on impactful projects, Turing aims to shape the future of AI\\-driven solutions, particularly in the realm of software engineering and automation.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking an experienced software engineer at the tech lead level to join our pioneering project focused on building large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets tailored for realistic software engineering problems. This role involves hands\\-on involvement in developing and automating environments, triaging issues from high\\-quality public GitHub repositories, and assessing test coverage and code quality. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in working with open\\-source projects, particularly in JavaScript and TypeScript, and possess a keen eye for detail in evaluating codebases. You will collaborate closely with researchers to identify challenging repositories and issues, contribute to dataset expansion, and potentially lead junior engineers on the team.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should have a minimum of three years of professional experience in software engineering, with proven expertise in JavaScript and TypeScript. Proficiency with version control systems like Git, containerization tools such as Docker, and experience setting up and managing software pipelines are essential. Candidates should demonstrate the ability to understand and navigate complex codebases, run and modify real\\-world projects locally, and contribute to open\\-source initiatives. Additional experience in LLM research, evaluation projects, or building developer tools will be considered a plus. Strong problem\\-solving skills, excellent communication abilities, and a collaborative mindset are vital for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a key member of our team, your responsibilities will include analyzing and triaging issues across trending open\\-source repositories on GitHub. You will set up and configure code repositories, including Dockerization and environment setup, to facilitate efficient testing and evaluation. Your role involves assessing unit test coverage and quality, modifying codebases locally to test LLM performance in bug\\-fixing and other scenarios, and collaborating with researchers to identify repositories that present challenges for language models. Additionally, you may lead a team of junior engineers, guiding their work and fostering a productive team environment. Your contributions will directly impact the quality and diversity of datasets used to train and evaluate LLMs for software engineering tasks.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Joining Turing offers the opportunity to work remotely in a flexible environment, allowing you to balance work and personal commitments effectively. You'll be involved in cutting\\-edge AI projects that have a meaningful impact on the future of software development. The role provides exposure to innovative research and development activities, fostering professional growth and skill enhancement. Additionally, you will have the chance to collaborate with leading experts in AI and software engineering, expanding your professional network. Turing also offers competitive compensation for freelance contractors, along with the flexibility to choose your preferred working hours within the required commitments.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diversity drives innovation and excellence, and we welcome applicants from all backgrounds to join our team and contribute to our mission of advancing AI technology.

Their core services include trucking, container haulage, depot yard operations, warehousing, distribution, and freight forwarding. Allied Container Group is distinguished by its commitment to innovation, leveraging a dedicated in\\-house technology team that harnesses the power of artificial intelligence and cutting\\-edge technology to optimize operations and develop advanced software and hardware solutions. This focus on innovation and operational excellence positions the company as a leader in the logistics sector, committed to providing reliable, efficient, and scalable logistics services to its global client base.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a talented and motivated Web Developer to join our Technology \\& Operations team. The successful candidate will work on both new and existing enterprise web platforms, ensuring seamless functionality, performance, and user experience. As a key member of our team, you will collaborate closely with UI/UX designers, project managers, and operational staff to deliver innovative solutions that enhance our logistics services. The role offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to a fast\\-paced, technology\\-driven environment, with potential for international relocation after successful completion of the initial probation period. **Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a minimum of two years of hands\\-on full\\-stack development experience, with proficiency in React, Laravel, React Native, HTML, CSS, and related JavaScript and PHP frameworks. A bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or an equivalent qualification, along with relevant work experience, is required. Candidates should demonstrate strong problem\\-solving skills within operational environments and possess a fundamental understanding of the software development lifecycle, UI/UX best practices, and automation principles. Familiarity with cloud services like AWS, Azure, or DigitalOcean, as well as CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure management, will be advantageous. Knowledge of OCR frameworks and system testing processes, including automated testing, is considered a plus. The ideal candidate should be proactive, collaborative, and capable of working independently to resolve complex technical issues.

* Collaborate with team leads and members to gather requirements, define project scope, and ensure timely delivery of features and functionalities.
* Work closely with UI/UX teams to ensure design consistency and optimal user experience across web and mobile platforms.

* Stay informed about emerging trends and technologies in web development to continually enhance skills and implement innovative solutions.

* Participate in system testing, troubleshooting, and debugging to ensure robust and reliable applications.
* Contribute to the development and refinement of automation scripts and AI\\-driven solutions to streamline logistics processes.
* Assist in the deployment and monitoring of applications within cloud environments, ensuring scalability and security.


**Benefits**
 Allied Container Group offers a competitive compensation package complemented by opportunities for professional growth and development. Employees benefit from exposure to cutting\\-edge logistics technology and innovative projects, fostering a dynamic and engaging work environment. The company provides comprehensive health and wellness benefits, along with paid leave and performance\\-based incentives. Additionally, the role offers potential international relocation opportunities, allowing talented individuals to advance their careers in Dubai or Oman after a successful probation period. The organization encourages continuous learning and skill enhancement, supporting employees in staying ahead of industry trends and technological advancements. Working in a collaborative, multicultural environment, employees will have the chance to develop their expertise and contribute to impactful projects within the global logistics landscape.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Allied Container Group is committed to creating an inclusive and diverse workplace. We provide equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees regardless of race, religion, gender, age, nationality, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse workforce fosters innovation, enhances problem\\-solving, and drives our company's success. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds and are dedicated to ensuring a fair and equitable hiring process. Our organization values the unique perspectives and experiences each individual brings and strives to maintain a respectful and supportive work environment for all.

description:
**About us** 




  





 We are an aerospace startup building unmanned aircraft systems for logistics, delivery, and emerging applications. We design, build, and fly our own aircraft. Our work spans the full stack: aerodynamic design, composite structures, flight software, and ground systems.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




  




* Deep protocol engineering work: designing and implementing binary telemetry and command protocols, custom message schemas, and vehicle\\-side integration for a real\\-time bidirectional data link between aircraft and ground
* Building a custom C\\+\\+/Qt desktop application for mission planning
* Real\\-time data pipeline design: high\\-frequency telemetry ingestion, state machine management, and latency\\-sensitive command handling
* Simulation and replay tooling
* Multi\\-vehicle coordination interfaces, BVLOS operational tooling, and integration with the autonomy and flight control stack



  





**Tech stack** 




  




* C\\+\\+ for the core GCS application

* CMake; cross\\-platform builds targeting Linux and Windows
* Git; comfortable working in and navigating a large existing C\\+\\+ codebase

* Strong software engineering fundamentals

* Experience with Qt or willingness to ramp up quickly
* Comfort with low\\-level protocol design
* Drone or UAV experience is a bonus
* 2–5 years of strong software experience; exceptional fresh graduates with relevant project work considered

 ͏

 1\\. Instrumental in understanding the requirements and design of the product/ software

title: Member of Technical Staff,FlashBlade
description:
We’re in an unbelievably exciting area of tech and are fundamentally reshaping the data storage industry. Here, you lead with innovative thinking, grow along with us, and join the smartest team in the industry.
   

  

 This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.
   

  

**SHOULD YOU ACCEPT THIS CHALLENGE...**
 This is an opportunity to be one of the seed members of a growing product team in the FlashBlade BU, one of the fastest growing at Pure. With the FlashBlade product, we are building a scale\\-out all\\-flash file and object store, designed for the modern world. To really understand how our customers work with data, we are deeply immersed in AI, modern backup, log analytics with Splunk and Elastic, data pipeline with Kafka, cluster computing with Spark, and many more use cases.
   

  

 You will love it on the FlashBlade team if you:
   

  

* Want to understand how modern applications \\- like AI or Splunk \\- work with data and how we can make it better.
* Enjoy working with distributed systems, algorithms, operating systems, Linux kernel, database internals, hypervisors, containers, compilers and hardware... or at least some of those.
* Are ready to dive into a complex problem and be the one who will drive it to a resolution.


 Want to work with other great engineers and develop or refine skills that will serve your entire career.
   

  

 If you, like us, say “bring it on” to exciting challenges that change the world, we have endless opportunities where you can make your mark.
   

  

**What You’ll Need To Bring To This Role...**
* Design, collaborate and implement creative new algorithms and technologies for high\\-performance, highly reliable systems (think six 9’s).
* Own and deliver innovation end\\-to\\-end, from concept to shipped product.
* Analyze and solve challenging problems through persistence and insight.
* Engage and effectively interact with stakeholders across product management, product development, system validation, support and even customers.
* Work as a team with smart peers who inspire you and who are inspired by you.
* Make customers really happy, because that’s why we do what we do.
* Learn a ton, whether you know a lot, or nothing about system software.
* Ownership E2E design development and also quality enterprise product/application deliverable exposure.
* A track record of setting and achieving high standards.
* Strong understanding of modern technology architecture


**Minimum Qualifications (education \\& Experience)**
* 8\\+ Years of experience in Developer level Linux platform experience; Strong programming skills in C, C\\+\\+, Python, Java, Go or other programming languages, and solid understanding of object\\-oriented programming.
* Strong foundation in data structures, algorithms and a strong understanding of threads, synchronization, concurrent programming.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills to effectively communicate product architectures, design proposals and negotiate options across stakeholders.
* Preferred Hands\\-on development experience in Storage Domain and related technologies.
* Preferred experience to make strategic architectural decisions and drive design and architecture evolution by driving various arch\\-forums
* Understand production systems, deployments and contribute to high availability and uptime of enterprise infrastructure deployments.
* BS in Computer Science, Information Systems, Computer Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering or closely related discipline;


**What You Can Expect From Us**
* Innovation: We celebrate those who think critically, like a challenge, and aspire to be trailblazers.
* Growth: We give you the space and support to grow along with us and to contribute to something meaningful. We have been named Fortune's Best Workplaces in Technology™, Fortune's Best Workplaces in the Bay Area™, and certified as a Great Place to Work®!
* Team: We build each other up and set aside ego for the greater good.


 And because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer a variety of perks to manage a healthy balance, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and company\\-sponsored team events. Check out purebenefits.com for more information.
   

  

**Accommodations And Accessibility**
 Candidates with disabilities may request accommodations for all aspects of our hiring process. For more on this, contact us at TA\\-Ops@purestorage.com if you’re invited to an interview.
   

  

**Our Commitment To a Strong And Inclusive Team**
 We’re forging a future where everyone finds their rightful place and where every voice matters. Where uniqueness isn’t just accepted but embraced. That’s why we are committed to fostering the growth and development of every person, cultivating a sense of community through our Employee Resource Groups and advocating for inclusive leadership.
   

  

 Everpure is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, transgender status, sexual stereotypes, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or any other characteristic legally protected by the laws of the jurisdiction in which you are being considered for hire.
   

  

**Join us and bring your best.**
**Bring your bold.**
**Pure and simple.**

description:
***Eurofins Scientific** 
 is an international life sciences company, providing a unique range of analytical testing services to clients across multiple industries, to make life and our environment safer, healthier and more sustainable. From the food you eat, to the water you drink, to the medicines you rely on, Eurofins laboratories work with the biggest companies in the world to ensure the products they supply are safe, their ingredients are authentic and labelling is accurate.*




*The Eurofins network of companies believes that it is a global leader in food, environment, pharmaceutical and cosmetic product testing and in discovery pharmacology, forensics, advanced material sciences and AgroScience contract research services. It is also one of the market leaders in certain testing and laboratory services for genomics, and in the support of clinical studies, as well as in biopharma contract development and manufacturing. It also has a rapidly developing presence in highly specialised and molecular clinical diagnostic testing and in\\-vitro diagnostic products.*




*In over* 
*37 years* 
*, Eurofins has grown from one laboratory in Nantes, France to over* 
*65,000 staff* 
*across a decentralised and entrepreneurial network of more than* 
*950 laboratories in over 1,000 companies* 
*across* 
*59 countries* 
*. Eurofins companies offer a portfolio of over 200,000 analytical methods to evaluate the safety, identity, composition, authenticity, origin, traceability and purity of biological substances and products.*




*In 2024, Eurofins generated total revenues of EUR 6\\.95 billion; and has been among the best performing stocks in Europe over the past 20 years.*

title: GenAI Developer
description:
A technology services firm operating in the Enterprise AI and Software Engineering sector, building production\\-grade Generative AI solutions for search, automation, and conversational interfaces. We partner with finance, retail, and SaaS customers to deliver end\\-to\\-end GenAI features—model fine\\-tuning, retrieval\\-augmented generation (RAG), and scalable inference pipelines. This is an on\\-site role based in India for engineers who can productionize GenAI systems and drive measurable product impact.
   

  

**Role \\& Responsibilities**
* Design, fine\\-tune, and validate generative language models for production use—implement training, adapters, and quantization workflows to meet latency and cost targets.
* Build end\\-to\\-end RAG pipelines: embed and index content, implement vector search, and integrate retrieval with LLM inference for contextualized responses.
* Develop and deploy inference APIs and microservices in Python; containerize with Docker and orchestrate on Kubernetes for resilient, scalable delivery.
* Integrate orchestration and agent frameworks (LangChain or equivalent), implement prompt engineering, response ranking, and automated evaluation suites.
* Collaborate with data scientists and product teams to translate experiments into production features; implement CI/CD, model governance, monitoring, and drift detection.
* Ensure security, privacy, and bias controls in model pipelines and maintain cost\\-efficient inference strategies for on\\-site deployments across cloud environments.


**Skills \\& Qualifications Must\\-Have**
* Python
* PyTorch
* Hugging Face Transformers
* LangChain
* FAISS
* Milvus
* Docker
* Kubernetes


**Preferred**
* TensorFlow
* Ray
* AWS SageMaker


**Qualifications**
* 3\\+ years of hands\\-on ML/AI engineering experience with at least 1\\+ years focused on LLMs or GenAI model productionization.
* Proven track record deploying ML services to production and ownership of CI/CD, monitoring, and cost\\-optimisation for inference.
* Willingness to work on\\-site in India and collaborate closely with cross\\-functional engineering and product teams.


**Benefits \\& Culture Highlights**
* Work on cutting\\-edge GenAI projects that move from research to production quickly.
* Collaborative, R\\&D\\-driven engineering culture with mentorship and career growth opportunities.
* Competitive compensation and performance\\-linked rewards; on\\-site engagement with focused product teams.

title: Senior QA Engineer (India)
description:
As a
 **Senior QA Engineer** 
 , you will ensure next‑generation IoT devices and applications deliver seamless performance by designing and executing robust test frameworks. You will validate connectivity, protocols, and end‑to‑end functionality across appliances, cloud, and front‑end applications, while driving automation and CI/CD adoption.
 



  





**What You’ll Do and How You’ll Succeed** 




  




* Test Wi‑Fi and BLE connectivity, preferably in commercial laundry environments.
* Perform MQTT protocol testing.
* Design test benches for functional end‑to‑end testing across appliance, cloud, and front‑end applications, including OTA and non‑functional test execution.
* Enhance or customise existing testing frameworks to enable automated testing using Python and PyTest across embedded devices, mobile apps, web apps, REST APIs, and cloud environments.
* Build CI/CD frameworks to enable faster deployments.
* Analyse technical needs, validate interfaces, and review logs from device, application, and system levels.
* Conduct functional, integration, and end‑to‑end test design and execution, including bug tracking.
* Manage defect lifecycle using JIRA.
* Provide clear communication and coordination across cross‑functional teams, bridging cultural and geographical gaps.
* Perform code reviews and contribute to framework improvements.



  





**We’d Love to Hear From You If…** 




  





**Experience** 



* You have hands‑on experience in Wi‑Fi, BLE, and MQTT testing.
* You are proficient in Python and PyTest automation tools.



  





**Technical Expertise** 



* You are experienced in designing automated test frameworks across diverse platforms.
* You are familiar with CI/CD practices and tools.
* You have strong debugging and log analysis skills.
* You are proficient in JIRA for defect lifecycle management.



  





**Ways of Working** 



* You communicate effectively across teams and cultures.
* You collaborate confidently with developers and QA teams.
* You prioritise tasks in the testing lifecycle and deliver results with precision.
* You are self‑driven, adaptable, and eager to join within 1–2 weeks.



  





**Assignment Details** 



* Location: Client office in Kharadi, Pune (on‑site, all working days)



  





 \\-\\-\\-
 



  





**Who We Are** 




  





 Thakral One is a consulting and technology services company headquartered in Singapore, with a pan\\-Asian presence. We focus primarily around technology\\-driven consulting, adoption of value\\-added bespoke solutions, enabling enhanced decision support through data analytics, and embracing possibilities in the cloud. We are heavily inclined towards building capabilities collaboratively with clients and believe strongly in improving grounded and practical outcomes.
 



  





 This approach is possible through our partnership with leading global technology providers and internal R\\&D teams. Our clients come from Financial Services, Banking, Telco, Government, Healthcare, and Consumer\\-oriented organisations.

title: S/W Engineer – Linux BSP (India)
description:
As a
 **Linux BSP Engineer for Automotive** 
 , you will design, develop, and optimise embedded software and firmware solutions, ensuring robust performance across automotive platforms. You will apply expertise in kernel development, device drivers, and automotive communication protocols to deliver reliable, compliant, and scalable systems.
 



  





**What You’ll Do and How You’ll Succeed** 




  




* Design and develop real‑time embedded software/firmware and PC/mobile applications.
* Analyse domain‑specific technical requirements and adapt solutions to meet customer and system needs.
* Participate in high‑level and low‑level software design activities.
* Perform unit, functional, and system testing, both manual and automated, ensuring bidirectional traceability.
* Conduct code reviews, apply coding guidelines, and perform static code analysis.
* Troubleshoot software issues and provide effective resolutions.
* Document technical deliverables including specifications, design documents, test cases, reports, and release notes.
* Follow defined software development lifecycle processes.
* Develop solutions using established programming languages and adopt new languages as required.



  





**We’d Love to Hear From You If…** 




  





**Experience** 



* You have 6–9 years of experience, including 5\\+ years in BSP or low‑level embedded software development, preferably in the automotive domain.



  





**Technical Expertise** 



* You are experienced with platforms such as QCOMM, NXP, TI, or Infineon.
* You have strong understanding of Android and kernel basics.
* You are skilled in embedded device driver development for ARM processors.
* You are proficient with ARM tools and scripting languages such as Python and Shell.
* You have hands‑on experience with QNX or Embedded Linux kernel development.
* You are familiar with virtualization technologies (QEMU, Xen, KVM) and virtual I/O frameworks.
* You understand automotive communication protocols including CAN, LIN, FlexRay, and Ethernet AVB/TSN.
* You are experienced with hardware bring‑up, debugging tools (JTAG, Lauterbach), and performance tuning.
* You have exposure to clock drivers, peripherals, diagnostics, IPC drivers, and power management drivers (advantage).
* You are knowledgeable about functional safety concepts and compliance processes.
* You are experienced with open‑source stack integration, Yocto, and CI/CD pipelines.
* You are familiar with configuration management objectives under DO‑178 and DO‑254\\.



  





**Ways of Working** 



* You are self‑driven, motivated, and eager to learn new technologies.
* You communicate effectively and collaborate across cross‑functional teams.
* You demonstrate strong problem‑solving and debugging skills.
* You maintain a positive attitude and deliver results in dynamic environments.



  





 \\-\\-\\-
 



  





**Who We Are** 




  





 Thakral One is a consulting and technology services company headquartered in Singapore, with a pan\\-Asian presence. We focus primarily around technology\\-driven consulting, adoption of value\\-added bespoke solutions, enabling enhanced decision support through data analytics, and embracing possibilities in the cloud. We are heavily inclined towards building capabilities collaboratively with clients and believe strongly in improving grounded and practical outcomes.
 



  





 This approach is possible through our partnership with leading global technology providers and internal R\\&D teams. Our clients come from Financial Services, Banking, Telco, Government, Healthcare, and Consumer\\-oriented organisations.

title: Senior OpenMRS / Bahmni Developer
description:
**Company Description**

 BluAd Digital Private Limited specializes in software and automation solutions for healthcare and enterprise operations. The company develops advanced Hospital Management Systems (HMS), Electronic Health Records (EHR), automation platforms, and data\\-driven tools to optimize operational efficiency. Its flagship product, BluMax Health, is an AI\\-powered HMS and EHR platform designed to enhance patient management and clinical workflows. Beyond healthcare, BluAd Digital creates customized enterprise software and data engineering systems to improve organizational decision\\-making processes. With expertise in healthcare systems, AI, automation, and digital infrastructure, BluAd Digital is at the forefront of intelligent software solutions.
   




**Role Description**

 We are seeking a full\\-time Senior OpenMRS / Bahmni Developer for an on\\-site position in Hyderabad. The role involves designing, customizing, and optimizing OpenMRS/Bahmni platforms to meet healthcare project requirements. Responsibilities include writing clean and efficient code, integrating third\\-party modules, troubleshooting system issues, and collaborating with cross\\-functional teams for seamless deployment. The role requires contributing to system architecture discussions, maintaining technical documentation, and staying updated on advancements in the OpenMRS/Bahmni ecosystem.
   




**Qualifications**
* Proven experience with OpenMRS, Bahmni platform, and healthcare software solutions
* Strong skills in Java, Spring Framework, Hibernate, and REST APIs
* Expertise in database management systems such as MySQL or PostgreSQL
* Proficiency with version control systems like Git and familiarity with Agile methodologies
* Hands\\-on experience with Linux, Docker, and other infrastructure deployment tools
* Problem\\-solving, debugging, and optimizing skills for complex systems
* Excellent written and verbal communication with the ability to document workflows and technical implementations
* A degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field is preferred
* Familiarity with healthcare IT standards (e.g., HL7, FHIR) is a plus

title: Lead Ai Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Blend is a leading provider of innovative digital banking solutions, dedicated to transforming the financial services industry through cutting\\-edge technology. With a focus on enhancing customer experiences and streamlining banking operations, Blend leverages advanced software engineering, data science, and AI\\-driven solutions to empower financial institutions worldwide. Our commitment to innovation, integrity, and excellence has established us as a trusted partner for banks and lenders seeking scalable, secure, and intelligent digital transformation.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Manager/Lead AI Engineer to join our dynamic team at Blend. In this pivotal role, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and deploying scalable AI solutions that address complex business challenges. You will work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including data scientists, software engineers, and product managers, to create innovative AI applications utilizing state\\-of\\-the\\-art frameworks and techniques. Your expertise will drive the implementation of Retrieval\\-Augmented Generation (RAG), agentic frameworks, and comprehensive MLOps workflows, ensuring our AI systems are robust, efficient, and aligned with business objectives.
   

  

 This position offers an exciting opportunity to lead end\\-to\\-end AI projects, from initial problem analysis and architecture design to production deployment and continuous monitoring. Candidates with a background in transitioning from data science roles into engineering, possessing both analytical depth and deployment expertise, will find this role particularly rewarding. You will play a key role in advancing our AI capabilities, mentoring junior engineers, and contributing to our strategic growth in AI\\-driven solutions.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will have over six years of professional experience, including at least one year as a Data Scientist and the remaining years in ML/AI Engineering or MLOps roles. Proven expertise with early LLM architectures such as BERT, RoBERTa, GPT\\-2, T5, or similar transformer models is essential. You should have a demonstrated track record of deploying LLM\\-based models into production environments, showcasing your ability to translate business needs into scalable AI solutions.
   

  

 Expert\\-level proficiency in Python programming and strong software engineering fundamentals are required. Experience working with cloud platforms, particularly Azure, and containerization technologies for AI/ML workloads is highly desirable. Familiarity with MLOps tools and practices, including model deployment, monitoring, and experiment tracking, is crucial for success in this role. A solid understanding of data science methodologies, production system design, version control (Git), and Agile/Scrum development processes is also necessary. Additionally, excellent communication skills and stakeholder management abilities are vital for collaborating effectively across teams and leading projects independently.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Analyze complex business problems and design innovative AI solutions from scratch, including architecture, approach selection, and technical feasibility assessment.
   

  

 Design, develop, and deploy production\\-ready AI systems emphasizing scalability, reliability, and performance.
   

  

 Implement Retrieval\\-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, fine\\-tuning techniques, and advanced prompt engineering strategies to optimize output quality.
   

  

 Build and integrate AI frameworks and agentic systems to solve sophisticated business challenges effectively.
   

  

 Design APIs, microservices, and event\\-driven architectures to support AI system deployment and integration.
   

  

 Develop and maintain MLOps/LLMOps pipelines, including CI/CD workflows, model versioning, and real\\-time monitoring to ensure operational excellence.
   

  

 Lead end\\-to\\-end project delivery, mentor junior team members, and foster a collaborative team environment.
   

  

 Work with transformer\\-based models, optimize large language model (LLM) integration patterns, and stay current with AI advancements.
   

  

 Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to translate AI capabilities into tangible business value, ensuring alignment with organizational goals.
   

  

 Contribute to the development of best practices in AI and MLOps, and actively participate in knowledge sharing initiatives.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Competitive salary package commensurate with experience and expertise.
   

  

 Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance plans.
   

  

 Opportunities for professional development, training, and certifications to stay at the forefront of AI technology.
   

  

 Flexible work arrangements and a supportive team environment.
   

  

 Generous paid time off and holiday leave policies to promote work\\-life balance.
   

  

 Participation in innovative projects that have a meaningful impact on the financial industry and beyond.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Blend is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, national origin, disability, or any other status protected by applicable law. We believe that a diverse team fosters innovation and drives success, and we welcome applicants from all backgrounds to join our mission to revolutionize digital banking through AI and technology.
